justification: The question concerns the euro short-term rate (€STR), which is a key central bank interest rate and a fundamental measure of the cost of borrowing in the euro area economy.
question: Will the euro short-term rate (volume-weighted trimmed mean), a measure of the borrowing costs of banks in the euro area, have increased by 2026-04-05 as compared to its value on 2026-03-29?
